Model::loadMaterialTextures -> texture added to textures: 1 | normal.png
Model::loadMaterialTextures -> setted texture and will return
Model::processMesh -> got normal texture
Model::loadMaterialTextures
Model::loadMaterialTextures texture empty
Model::processMesh -> got height texture
Model::processMesh -> loaded textures

ions.

[GL DEBUG] Buffer detailed info: Buffer object 99 (bound to GL_ARRAY_BUFFER_ARB, usage hint is GL_STATIC_DRAW) will use VIDEO memory as the source for buffer object operat
ions.
[GL DEBUG] Buffer detailed info: Buffer object 100 (bound to GL_ELEMENT_ARRAY_BUFFER_ARB, usage hint is GL_STATIC_DRAW) will use VIDEO memory as the source for buffer obje
ct operations.
